title: What are LangChain Deep Agents?
hook: LangChain shipped something that makes CrewAI and AutoGen look like toys. Nobody noticed.

title: Is Grep All You Need? Agent Harness Paper
hook: Grep beats vector search inside AI agents. The results broke everyone's assumptions.

title: LongCat-2.0: Open-Source 1M Context That Beats GPT-5.5
hook: Meituan just dropped a 1.6T parameter model with 1M token context. MIT licensed. It outperforms GPT-5.5 on SWE-bench Pro.

title: MCP Goes Stateless: The Biggest Protocol Rewrite Since Launch
hook: The MCP spec just got its largest revision ever. Sessions are gone. Your server can now run behind a basic load balancer.

title: SkillOpt: Your Agent's Skills Are Trainable Parameters
hook: Microsoft trained agent skills like neural network weights. +23 points on GPT-5.5 without changing a single model parameter.

title: Antidoom: One LoRA to Kill Your Model's Doom Loops
hook: Liquid AI found the exact token that starts a repetition loop. One LoRA adapter, trained in hours, drops Qwen3.5-4B looping from 22.9% to 1%.

title: VulnHunter: Capital One Built an Agent That Hacks Your Code First
hook: Capital One open-sourced an agentic security tool that thinks like an attacker. It finds the bug, writes a PoC exploit, runs it, then fixes your code.

title: Ring-Zero: Your Model Has Context Anxiety and Nobody Programmed It
hook: Ant Group scaled Zero RL to 1 trillion parameters. Five cognitive behaviors emerged that nobody coded - including a model that panics about running out of tokens.

title: Inkling: The Former OpenAI CTO Did What Altman Would Not
hook: Mira Murati left OpenAI, built a 975B-parameter frontier model from scratch, and released it fully open under Apache 2.0. The largest American open-weights model.
